code: {/*Elementos necesarios.*/}import React,{useState}from'react';import ScrollListener from'./components/ScrollListener';{/*Elementos constantes y array de objetos necesarios.*/}import{_routes,tabs,smallLayers,mediumLayers,largeLayers}from'./constants';{/*Elementos adicionales.*/}import CustomTitleBar from'./components/CustomTitleBar';import CustomFooterButtons from'./components/CustomFooterButtons';import CustomScrollProgressBar from'./components/CustomScrollProgressBar';import CustomParallax from'./components/CustomParallax';import CustomTab from'./components/CustomTab';{/*Paginas*/}import Game from'./pages/Game';import Home from'./pages/Home';import{BrowserRouter as Router,Routes,Route}from'react-router-dom';import'./App.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function App(){{/*Definimos el scrollPercentage*/}const[scrollPercentage,setScrollPercentage]=useState(0);const handleScroll=percentage=>{setScrollPercentage(percentage);};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"App",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(ScrollListener,{onScroll:handleScroll}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("header",{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(CustomTitleBar,{title:"Federico Garcia Barreiro"})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"custom-body",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("section",{id:"section-0",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(CustomParallax,{scrollPercentage:scrollPercentage,largeLayers:largeLayers,mediumLayers:mediumLayers,smallLayers:smallLayers})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Router,{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Routes,{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Route,{path:'/',element:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Home,{})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Route,{path:'/game',element:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Game,{})})]})})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("footer",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(CustomFooterButtons,{scrollPercentage:scrollPercentage}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(CustomScrollProgressBar,{scrollPercentage:scrollPercentage})]})]});}export default App;
